rationale: Educ. Code §13.156 governs property title and debt assumption for consolidating school districts. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Title to all property of the consolidating districts vests in the consolidated district, and the consolidated district assumes and is liable for the outstanding indebtedness of the consolidating districts.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school district consolidation, not homestead exemptions.
